title: ‘We won’t know who won until final outcome of US-Iran ceasefire’
full_text:
‘We won't know who won until final outcome of US-Iran ceasefire’
‘We won’t know who won until final outcome of US-Iran ceasefire’
As the US and Iran inch towards a deal to end the war, analyst Trita Parsi argues the framework resembles the original ceasefire deal before Trump disrupted it with a blockade of Iranian ports. He points out the role that regional powers have played in making this agreement happen.
Published On 24 May 2026
